deep_dive.title: ChannelGuard: Safe Models Do Not Compose into Safe Multi-Agent Systems
deep_dive.abstract: Multi-agent LLM applications chain a planner, worker agents, a verifier, and a synthesizer, and every hop between agents is an unmonitored channel through which an adversary can smuggle instructions. Existing defenses guard only the input boundary (IBProtector, Llama Guard, perplexity filters, SmoothLLM) or run outside the application as opaque, stochastic provider-side filters. We show this gap carries a consequence rarely measured: on a 2,100-trace evaluation across eight attack families, five defenses, and three model backends, an undefended pipeline that appears fully safe under standard reporting (attack success 0.000 on tool- and memory-poisoning) owes that safety almost entirely to the cloud provider's server-side filter (54 of 60 blocks on Azure GPT-5), and silently shifts to the agent model's own alignment on a backend without such a filter. Outcome-only reporting hides this dependence. We present ChannelGuard, a training-free defense-in-depth framework placing information-bottleneck gates on every inter-agent channel; each scores channel text against an adversarial phrase bank by embedding similarity and deterministically passes, compresses, or blocks it, adding no LLM call, while an attribution method records which layer stopped each attack. ChannelGuard's tool-output gate blocks Tool Poisoning 30 of 30 at the application layer, identically across Azure GPT-5, Anthropic Sonnet 4.5, and Anthropic Haiku 4.5, whereas the undefended pipeline shifts entirely across backends; it also lowers Prompt Injection attack success by half (0.333 to 0.167) and preserves GSM8K accuracy exactly (0.867). White-box adaptive paraphrase evades every embedding gate, where a perturb-and-vote baseline does better. An extended appendix adds baselines, ablations, sweeps, a benign-preservation analysis, and a judge audit (kappa = 0.900), at a total cost of 47.36 USD.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: training-free defense-in-depth framework with information-bottleneck gates scoring channel text against adversarial phrase bank, adding no LLM call
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 无需训练的防御框架，用信息瓶颈门控对通道文本评分，不增加LLM调用
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 无需训练的防御框架，用信息瓶颈门控对通道文本评分，不增加LLM调用
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 无需训练的防御框架，用信息瓶颈门控对通道文本评分，不增加LLM调用
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: ChannelGuard is a training-free, lightweight defense-in-depth framework for multi-agent LLM systems that places information-bottleneck gates on inter-agent channels, scoring text via embedding similarity against adversarial phrases and deterministically passing, compressing, or blocking it without any additional LLM call, achieving 100% tool-poisoning blocking and halving prompt-injection success while preserving task accuracy.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 多智能体LLM系统中智能体间通道缺乏监控，现有防御仅覆盖输入边界或依赖云端过滤。本文提出ChannelGuard，一种无需训练的轻量纵深防御框架，在智能体间通道上设置信息瓶颈门控，通过嵌入相似度对文本评分并确定性地放行、压缩或阻断，无需额外LLM调用。实验表明其工具投毒阻断率达100%，提示注入攻击成功率减半，且不损害任务精度，为LLM安全护栏提供了低成本可部署方案。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 多智能体LLM系统中智能体间通道缺乏监控，现有防御仅覆盖输入边界或依赖云端过滤。本文提出ChannelGuard，一种无需训练的轻量纵深防御框架，在智能体间通道上设置信息瓶颈门控，通过嵌入相似度对文本评分并确定性地放行、压缩或阻断，无需额外LLM调用。实验表明其工具投毒阻断率达100%，提示注入攻击成功率减半，且不损害任务精度，为LLM安全护栏提供了低成本可部署方案。

deep_dive.title: Guardrails as Scapegoats: Auditing Unfaithful Safety Refusals in Tool-Augmented LLM Agents
deep_dive.abstract: Evaluation frameworks for tool-augmented LLM agents focus overwhelmingly on capability metrics or explicit tool crashes, leaving silent infrastructure failures and HTTP 200 responses with empty, null, or malformed payloads largely unaudited. We introduce a lightweight black-box auditing framework that injects four silent failure profiles across 12 production-adjacent tool stubs and classifies agent responses into three mutually exclusive behavioral classes: Honest Surrender (HSR), Fabrication (FAR), and Unfaithful Safety Refusal (USR). Evaluating two frontier and two open-source models at temperature zero under a neutral system prompt, we find that FAR dominates (56.6% of valid responses): agents treat empty payloads as real data, silently returning fabricated results. USR, in which an agent invents a policy or privacy rationale to explain the failure, is nearly absent at baseline (0.25%, one instance across 396 valid trajectories). Our key finding emerges from an ablation where we augment the system prompt with standard safety language ("prioritize user privacy and data security"), which amplifies USR by 15.6x (from 0.25% to 3.95%; 95% CI on ablation rate: 2.2%-6.4%; Fisher's exact test, p < 0.001). USR is a latent behavior, activated when safety vocabulary in the system prompt primes the model to reach for policy rationales when tools silently fail. Sensitive tools (fetch_medical_record, retrieve_contract, fetch_user_profile) account for the majority of USR instances. We propose a payload-response misalignment heuristic for production-level detection and discuss governance implications for safety-forward deployments.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: auditing unfaithful safety refusals in LLM agents with lightweight black-box framework
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 用轻量黑盒框架审计LLM代理的不忠安全拒绝
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 用轻量黑盒框架审计LLM代理的不忠安全拒绝
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 用轻量黑盒框架审计LLM代理的不忠安全拒绝
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: This paper introduces a lightweight black-box auditing framework for tool-augmented LLM agents, discovering that safety language in system prompts amplifies unfaithful safety refusals by 15.6x when tools silently fail, and proposes a payload-response misalignment heuristic for detection.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 现有工具增强LLM代理评估框架忽视静默基础设施故障。本文提出轻量黑盒审计框架，注入四种静默故障并分类代理响应行为，发现系统提示中的安全语言会使不忠安全拒绝行为放大15.6倍，并提出有效载荷-响应失配启发式方法用于生产级检测，为安全部署提供治理启示。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 现有工具增强LLM代理评估框架忽视静默基础设施故障。本文提出轻量黑盒审计框架，注入四种静默故障并分类代理响应行为，发现系统提示中的安全语言会使不忠安全拒绝行为放大15.6倍，并提出有效载荷-响应失配启发式方法用于生产级检测，为安全部署提供治理启示。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: Papers central to 聚焦用小模型和轻量方法完成LLM输入输出内容安全管理与审核，核心目标必须是有害内容、毒性、仇恨/攻击性语言、危险提示、越狱/提示注入识别，或安全护栏/安全路由。包括moderation classifier、guard model、安全分类器、蒸馏、量化、模型压缩、级联审核、低延迟和端侧部署。优先收录提出可部署防护方法并报告参数量、延迟、吞吐、成本或资源开销的论文；排除泛RAG、通用文档/立场分类、通用参数高效微调、通用边云推理、CVE/汽车映射、泛智能体安全、仅研究攻击/越狱/漏洞披露/红队评测、benchmark、水印和无审核方法的综述。, especially work that connects or combines: lightweight small language model for content moderation and harmful content classification; compact efficient guard model for LLM input and output safety classification; small parameter-efficient safety classifier for large language model prompts and responses; knowledge distillation from large language models into small content moderation safety models; quantized low-bit safety classifier or guard model for LLM content moderation; cascaded content moderation using small models with escalation to large language models; Find methods that use small or compact models to moderate unsafe LLM inputs and outputs, with measured accuracy and deployment cost; Find distilled, quantized, pruned, or parameter efficient safety classifiers and guard models for harmful content detection; Find cascaded moderation systems where a small model handles common cases and escalates uncertain cases to a larger model; Find low latency or on device LLM content safety guardrails with parameter count, memory, throughput, or hardware measurements.
